headline: Major bank consolidates Canary Wharf footprint, subletting two floors
summary: A global bank announced it will sublet office space at Canary Wharf as it adopts hybrid working, adding to availability in the submarket.

headline: West End demand stays resilient as occupiers chase prime ESG-rated space
summary: Flight-to-quality continues to favour West End Grade A buildings with strong sustainability credentials, keeping vacancy low.

headline: Bank of England signals rates will stay higher for longer
summary: Policymakers indicated the base rate will remain elevated, raising financing costs for commercial real estate investors.

headline: Tech occupier expands City of London HQ in flight-to-quality move
summary: A technology firm pre-let additional Grade A space in the City, citing sustainability and amenity quality.

headline: Hybrid working continues to weigh on secondary office demand
summary: Occupiers are reducing footprints for older, lower-grade buildings as hybrid working persists across London.
